title: DLaiy's Choice
description:
Modpack for DLaiy's Community Server

Performance Mods included

A Modpack focusing on Vanilla+ by adding more animations, immersive sound, voicechat and other visual enhancements with some additional features.
body:
Modpack for DLaiy's Community Server

Performance Mods included
Uses distant horizons, use more than 2GB ram

A Modpack focusing on Vanilla+ by adding more animations, immersive sound, voicechat and other visual enhancements with some additional features.

Also adds new gameplay features such as pipes, filter hoppers, decorative blocks, random animal sizes, better enchanting/xp calculation, vastly more villages and other POI's whilst using tectonics amazing terrain generation.

Includes server sided claiming, voicechat and /spawn /tpa /sethome /home

Personal favorite and best performance shaders with Distant Horizons support
